reasoning_content: We need to determine if 193 is prime. Check divisibility: not divisible by 2 (odd), by 3 (sum digits 1+9+3=13, not divisible by 3), by 5 (last digit not 0 or 5), by 7: 7*27=189, remainder 4, so no. by 11: 11*17=187, remainder 6; 11*18=198 too high. by 13: 13*14=182, remainder 11; 13*15=195 too high. by 17: 17*11=187, remainder 6; 17*12=204 >193. So no factors up to sqrt(193) ~13.9, so prime. Answer yes.
